macro.title: Broeksmit presses regulators on cost drivers as “stubbornly high” rates persist
macro.what: Mortgage Bankers Association (MBA) president and CEO Bob Broeksmit said regulators should prioritize rolling back rules that raise costs as mortgage rates are likely to stay “stubb
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: The Clear Cooperation Policy is dead. The MRED model is what replaces it.

housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The Price Point: What $400,000 Buys in These Hot U.S. Neighborhoods
housing.what: In this edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re looking at some of the hottest real estate markets in the country, according to Redfin’s latest analysis

housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.
